analysis:
ISSUES FOUND:

- CRITICAL: Complete system silence - no logs from any workflow (weekly pipeline, learning loop, Alpaca trading, premarket monitor, weekend catalyst refresh) for past 7 days
- Recommended action: Investigate system status immediately - likely complete system failure or logging infrastructure down

ISSUES FOUND:

• **CRITICAL**: Health check shows "No log entries found for past 7 days" - this indicates either a logging system failure or complete system inactivity for the entire monitoring period

• **WARNING**: Only 1 workflow (alpaca_trader/monitor) active in logs - missing weekly pipeline, learning loop, premarket monitor, and weekend catalyst refresh workflows

• **WARNING**: Multiple alpaca_trader exit attempts (20:08 and 21:12) suggest potential retry behavior or incomplete exit processing

The logging gap makes it impossible to assess system health properly. Investigate logging infrastructure and verify if other workflows actually ran but failed to log.

ISSUES FOUND:

• **CRITICAL**: No weekly pipeline execution detected in past 7 days - missing core ranking/trading logic that should run weekly
• **CRITICAL**: No learning loop activity found - model performance tracking and retraining appears offline  
• **CRITICAL**: No weekend catalyst refresh detected - Sunday evening and Monday morning runs missing
• **CRITICAL**: No premarket monitoring on Monday morning - missing 5 expected premarket checks
• **WARNING**: Only exit trades executed via alpaca_trader, no entry trades detected - may indicate missing buy signals or incomplete weekly cycle
• **WARNING**: Alpaca monitor session shows no phase transitions over 10 polls - unusually quiet market activity or potential monitoring issues

Recommend immediate investigation of weekly pipeline scheduler and verification of all workflow automation.

ISSUES FOUND:

• **CRITICAL** - collect_returns: Hard failure due to dtype error on 'composite_rank' column [2026-04-17 23:44:31]. This suggests data corruption in ranking output. Investigate column types in weekly pipeline output.

• **CRITICAL** - retrain: Complete training failure - no rows passed feature/label mask across 29 weeks of data [2026-04-17 23:45:08, 2026-04-18 02:36:08]. Training pipeline is broken, model not updating.

• **WARNING** - alpaca_trader: High failure rate on entries - 9 filled but 11 failed (55% failure rate) [2026-04-20 19:41:19]. Failed symbols: ALLO, BCRX, PRDO, PRME, SFD, SNDX, CTLP, STRC, XTIA, SAFT. Investigate liquidity/availability issues.

• **WARNING** - premarket_monitor: DST configuration issues causing skips [2026-04-20 13:59:24, 2026-04-21 12:54:41]. Monitor not running during expected premarket hours.

• **INFO** - alpaca_trader: Multiple incomplete exit attempts on Wed/Thu, no completion logged for Friday exit workflow. Verify positions were properly closed.

ISSUES FOUND:

- CRITICAL: collect_returns workflow failed [2026-04-17 23:44:31] - "Column 'composite_rank' has dtype object, cannot use method 'nsmallest'" - data type corruption preventing returns collection, investigate data pipeline integrity

- WARNING: retrain workflow consistently skipping [2026-04-17 23:45:08, 2026-04-18 02:36:08] - "no training rows passed feature/label mask" across 29 weeks of data (85,346 raw rows) - model not updating, review feature/label filtering logic

- WARNING: alpaca_trader high failure rate [2026-04-20 19:41:19] - 11 out of 20 entry orders failed (55% failure rate) - significantly above normal 0-2 failed per week, investigate order execution issues

- WARNING: premarket_monitor not running [2026-04-20 13:59:24, 2026-04-21 12:54:41] - DST guard preventing execution (CT hour 8 and 7 vs expected 6) - monitor missing premarket checks, adjust scheduling for daylight saving time

ISSUES FOUND:

• **CRITICAL**: execution_tracker failed with unhandled exception on 2026-04-25 02:03:49 - "cannot access local variable 'score_row'" - likely preventing proper position tracking

• **CRITICAL**: alpaca_monitor repeatedly failed to place stops for MXL position throughout 2026-04-30 - "insufficient qty available" errors indicate position may be unprotected by stop losses

• **WARNING**: retrain skipped on 2026-04-24 23:42:29 - "no training rows passed feature/label mask" with 29 weeks of data suggests potential data quality issue

• **WARNING**: premarket_monitor consistently skipped due to DST guard (expected hour 6 CT, running at hours 7-9) - may miss critical premarket moves

• **WARNING**: in_sample_ic at 0.2531 is below normal range (0.40-0.75) indicating poor model performance

• **INFO**: Weekend refresh universe shows only 2,980 symbols vs normal 4,800-5,500 range - significantly smaller universe

ISSUES FOUND:

- **CRITICAL**: execution_tracker unhandled exception on 2026-04-25 02:03:49 - "cannot access local variable 'score_row'" preventing execution tracking completion
- **CRITICAL**: retrain skipped on 2026-04-24 23:42:29 - no training rows passed feature/label mask despite 29 weeks of data, model may be stale
- **WARNING**: premarket_monitor consistently skipped due to DST guard issues on 2026-04-27 and 2026-04-28 - expected hour 6 but running at hours 7-9
- **WARNING**: alpaca_monitor repeated MXL stop order failures (26 errors) on 2026-04-30 - insufficient quantity available, position may be unprotected
- **INFO**: model IC at 0.2531 is below normal range (0.40-0.75), indicating poor predictive performance

Actions needed: Fix execution_tracker variable scoping bug, investigate retrain feature/label mask filtering, adjust premarket_monitor DST logic, resolve MXL position/order conflict in Alpaca.

ISSUES FOUND:

- **CRITICAL**: execution_tracker: Unhandled NaN conversion error on 2026-05-02 02:51:52 - execution tracking may be incomplete, verify trade records manually

- **WARNING**: premarket_monitor: DST guard blocking all Monday premarket checks (expected hour 6 CT, getting 7-9) - monitor not running when needed for market open preparation

- **WARNING**: alpaca_monitor: Persistent poll errors across multiple sessions (74-104 total errors May 5-7) - API connectivity or data feed issues affecting position monitoring

- **INFO**: alpaca_trader: Only 6 positions closed on exit vs 10 entered - 4 positions may have been stopped out during week, verify stops executed properly

ISSUES FOUND:

- CRITICAL: execution_tracker workflow failure on 2026-05-02 02:51:52 - "cannot convert float NaN to integer" error preventing execution tracking. Investigate data integrity and fix NaN handling.

- WARNING: alpaca_monitor experiencing consistent poll_errors (10 errors per session) on 2026-05-05 and 2026-05-06, indicating potential API connectivity or data retrieval issues. Monitor resolved by 2026-05-08.

- WARNING: premarket_monitor not running at expected 6 AM CT due to DST guard triggering at hours 7, 8, and 9 on multiple days. Verify DST logic is correctly configured.

- INFO: Model IC score at 0.2755 is below normal range (0.40-0.75), indicating potential model degradation requiring review.

ISSUES FOUND:

**CRITICAL**

- **execution_tracker [2026-05-09 00:01:43]**: Unhandled exception — "No columns to parse from file." A tracking file is empty or corrupted. The tracker failed on the first run and only succeeded on retry with a different week (2026-05-08). Confirm the file for week 2026-05-01 is intact and that execution data was not lost. Investigate what caused the malformed file.

- **alpaca_trader / exit [2026-05-15 21:41:44]**: Second exit run failed to close ATOM, FSLY, and SEDG (3 failed, 0 closed, week reported as +0.00%). The first exit run at 20:46 closed only 3 positions successfully. Combined, 3 of 10 positions were not exited by end of week. Verify current position status for ATOM, FSLY, and SEDG in Alpaca immediately — these may still be open and unhedged going into the weekend.

- **retrain in_sample_ic [2026-05-09]**: IC score of 0.2816–0.2846 is significantly below the normal floor of 0.40. The model is being retrained and deployed on a score well outside acceptable range. This means the scoring model currently driving live trades has poor predictive validity. Review feature quality, training data, and whether the model should be used until IC recovves.

**WARNING**

- **learning_loop: duplicate runs [2026-05-09 00:02 through 02:57]**: self_refine and retrain executed 4 times in ~3 hours, producing inconsistent weight change counts (6, 5, 12, 9) on identical data. Multiple triggers are firing the learning loop redundantly. This wastes compute and the diverging weight-change counts suggest non-determinism in the refinement logic. Investigate what is triggering repeated runs and add deduplication.

- **universe size [all pipeline/refresh runs]**: Weekend refresh shows only 2,014 symbols processed, versus a normal range of 4,800–5,500. This is less than half the expected universe. If the weekly pipeline is also running on a reduced universe, signal coverage and ranking quality are significantly degraded. Confirm whether the pipeline Stage 01 universe size matches normal range (elapsed time of 604s looks plausible for full run, but refresh universe size needs explanation).

- **premarket_monitor [2026-05-12 13:01, 13:31]**: All Monday premarket checks skipped due to DST guard misfiring (CT hour=8, expected 6). The expected 5 Monday morning checks did not run. DST offset in the guard logic appears incorrect — it is blocking legitimate 8am CT runs. Fix the DST hour check and confirm no actionable premarket alerts were missed this week.

- **alpaca_monitor / PENG [2026-05-12 21:32]**: Phase 2 trail submission failed due to insufficient available quantity (221 requested, 56 available — 165 shares held for orders). This indicates a conflicting open order was locking shares. The system recovered on the next session, but the trailing stop was unprotected overnight on 2026-05-12. Review order management logic to prevent stop conflicts from leaving positions unprotected.

- **alpaca_trader: exit discrepancy [2026-05-15]**: Exit run 1 (20:46) closed 3 positions from an opening value of $103,763 at -4.08%. Exit run 2 (21:41) saw a different opening value of $99,383 and closed 0 of 3. The two runs disagree on portfolio state and which positions remain open. This inconsistency needs reconciliation — confirm actual Alpaca account state and whether ATOM, FSLY, SEDG exits were ultimately executed.

**INFO**

- **collect_returns [2026-05-09 00:58]**: A third collect_returns run inserted 2,988 duplicate rows (total_rows remained 97,065 despite reporting rows_added=2988 again). Deduplication appears to be working, but the repeated trigger is unnecessary. Same pipeline over-triggering issue as noted in learning loop above.
- **top_score normalization anomaly**: Weekend

ISSUES FOUND:

- **CRITICAL | retrain | 2026-05-09 00:02:24–02:57:47**: In-sample IC of **0.2816–0.2846** is far below the normal floor of 0.40. The model retrained 4 times across the night and never exceeded 0.2846. Every ranking and trade this week was driven by a poorly predictive model. Investigate feature degradation, label construction, or data quality. Manual review of this week's rankings is warranted before next entry.

- **CRITICAL | execution_tracker | 2026-05-09 00:01:43**: Unhandled exception — "No columns to parse from file." Execution tracking for the prior week failed on first attempt. The tracking file may be empty, malformed, or missing. Verify the execution log file integrity and confirm prior week's trade records are intact.

- **CRITICAL | alpaca_trader exit | 2026-05-15 21:41:44**: Second exit attempt failed to close **ATOM, FSLY, SEDG** (3 positions, 0 closed). The first exit run at 20:46 only closed 3 positions. Combined, 7 of 10 positions may remain open or have had inconsistent exit handling. Confirm current position state in Alpaca immediately and manually close any residual positions if still open.

- **WARNING | alpaca_monitor | 2026-05-12 21:32:32**: Trail stop submission for **PENG** failed due to insufficient available quantity (165 shares held for existing orders, only 56 free of 221 total). System flagged recovery on next poll, and state was reconciled the following day (2026-05-13). Confirm the trail stop that was ultimately placed reflects the correct full position size.

- **WARNING | premarket_monitor | 2026-05-12 13:01–13:31, 2026-05-11 13:38**: All premarket monitor attempts were skipped via DST guard — system expected CT hour=6 but fired at hour=8 or hour=10. Zero of the expected 5 Monday checks ran. Any premarket gap/catalyst signals were missed for the week. Review scheduler configuration for DST offset handling.

- **WARNING | self_refine | 2026-05-09 00:02–02:57**: Weight changes varied widely across 4 runs on the same dataset: 6 → 5 → 12 → 9 changes. Non-deterministic refinement on identical data suggests instability in the refinement logic. The model trained on the last run's weights may reflect an arbitrary configuration.

- **INFO | weekly_pipeline**: Ran twice in the same morning (04:23 and 05:21), with the second correctly blocked by ghost-run prevention. No impact, but indicates duplicate invocation — check scheduler or manual trigger duplication.

- **INFO | weekend_refresh**: Top score jumped from **0.9301** (sunday_night) to **1.0** on the first manual refresh, and top pick changed from INOD to PAYS by the third run. Three refresh runs on Sunday is above the expected two (Sunday evening + Monday morning). The Monday morning scheduled refresh does not appear in logs — confirm it ran or was substituted by the manual runs.

- **INFO | alpaca_trader exit | 2026-05-15 20:46**: Only **3 of 10** positions were closed in the primary exit run (week return: -4.08%). It is unclear why the remaining 7 were not exited — stops may have been triggered intraweek for some, but this should be confirmed against Alpaca position history.

ISSUES FOUND:

- **CRITICAL | alpaca_trader | 2026-05-18 21:51:05**: Second entry attempt failed catastrophically — 19 of 20 orders failed (only 1 filled). Symbols affected: POET, AAOI, PENG, RKLB, INTC, FCEL, VECO, LITE, NBIS, SIMO (list appears truncated at 10 but failed=19). A successful 10-fill entry had already completed at 21:58:08; this second attempt ~53 minutes later is the anomalous run. Confirm whether duplicate/conflicting positions were created, and whether the 19 failed orders represent missed positions or erroneous re-entry attempts. Root cause of order failures requires investigation.

- **CRITICAL | retrain | 2026-05-16 00:01:18 and 03:24:00**: In-sample IC of 0.2789 is far below the acceptable floor of 0.40. Model is underperforming threshold on training data itself, meaning live scoring this week used a degraded model. Assess whether ranked output for the week was materially affected.

- **WARNING | self_refine | 2026-05-16 03:23:58**: Weight validation rejected — signal_weights summed to 1.0500 instead of 1.0. The earlier successful refinement run (00:01:15) produced 7 weight changes; it is unclear whether those weights passed validation or were also malformed. Confirm which weight set is currently active in the scoring model.

- **WARNING | premarket_monitor**: Zero of the expected 5 Monday morning premarket checks executed. All attempts were skipped by DST guard — CT hour was 8, 9, or 10 instead of the expected 6. No valid premarket check ran on either 2026-05-18 (Sunday, two skips) or 2026-05-19 (Monday, two skips). Verify DST offset configuration; scheduled trigger times appear misaligned by 2–3 hours.

- **WARNING | execution_tracker | 2026-05-16 00:00:23**: `basket_avg_return` and `top_contributor` are both `None` for the week of 2026-05-15. Performance attribution data is missing for that week's 17 tracked positions. Confirm whether this is a data availability lag or a logging/calculation failure.

- **INFO | weekend_refresh | 2026-05-18**: Monday morning refresh did not run (only sunday_night and two manual_refresh runs completed, with the second manual blocked as duplicate). Standard monday_morning label refresh appears absent. Confirm if manual runs are intended to substitute.

- **INFO | alpaca_trader | 2026-05-18**: System is running in **PAPER** mode. Confirm this is intentional for the current week.

ISSUES FOUND:

- **CRITICAL | retrain | 2026-05-16 00:01:18 & 03:24:00**: In-sample IC of **0.2789** is severely below the normal floor of 0.40. The model scoring this week's trades was operating well outside acceptable range. Investigate feature quality, training data integrity, and whether this week's rankings were materially compromised.

- **CRITICAL | alpaca_trader | 2026-05-18 21:51:05**: Second entry attempt resulted in **19/20 orders FAILED** (only 1 filled). Affected symbols: POET, AAOI, PENG, RKLB, INTC, FCEL, VECO, LITE, NBIS, SIMO (list truncated — 10 shown, 19 total failed). A successful 10-fill entry had already run at 20:58:05. Determine whether this was a duplicate entry attempt and whether any of the 19 failed orders represent unintended positions or missed entries. Verify final position state is clean.

- **WARNING | self_refine | 2026-05-16 03:23:58**: Weight validation **REJECTED** — signal weights summed to 1.0500 instead of 1.0. The prior successful self_refine run (00:01:15) applied 7 weight changes; the second run's proposed weights failed validation and were not applied. Confirm which weight set is currently active and whether the rejected weights would have been materially different.

- **WARNING | premarket_monitor**: Zero successful premarket checks ran on Monday morning (2026-05-19). All attempts were skipped by the DST guard (CT hours 8 and 9, expected 6). The guard appears miscalibrated for current DST offset. Expected 5 checks completed; actual: **0**. Review DST logic and confirm no actionable premarket signals were missed.

- **INFO | weekend_refresh | 2026-05-18**: Sunday night refresh ran as expected. No Monday morning refresh ran (the label used was `manual_refresh`, not a distinct `monday_morning` run). Confirm this is intended behavior or whether a separate Monday morning refresh label should have fired.

- **INFO | universe_size**: Universe across all pipeline and refresh runs shows ~2,035 symbols — well below the expected 4,800–5,500 range. If this is a deliberate filtered subset rather than the full universe, document the intended scope. If not intentional, investigate universe builder (Stage 01) output.

ISSUES FOUND:

- **CRITICAL | retrain | 2026-05-23 00:13:08 & 03:28:14**: In-sample IC score is 0.2831, well below the normal floor of 0.40. This is the model currently driving live rankings and trade selection. Investigate feature degradation, training data quality, or regime shift. Do not use current model output for new entries until IC is explained and resolved.

- **CRITICAL | alpaca_trader | 2026-05-26 22:11:57**: Second entry run failed completely — 0 filled, 20 failed across all 10 symbols (primary + fallbacks). This occurred ~50 minutes after a successful first entry run that filled all 10. Likely a duplicate/erroneous trigger. Confirm no unintended double-entry was placed and that positions were not duplicated or partially corrupted heading into the week.

- **WARNING | self_refine | 2026-05-23 00:13:05**: Weight refinement rejected sentiment signal weight of 0.03, below the minimum threshold of 0.05. The subsequent successful refinement run (03:28:12) applied 8 weight changes — confirm sentiment weight was corrected to a valid value and that the rejected weights did not persist into any intermediate model state.

- **WARNING | alpaca_trader | 2026-05-25 21:19:54 & 22:15:23**: `place_stops` mode was invoked twice on a confirmed market holiday (Memorial Day). Neither run logged a skip or completion event. Unclear whether these executed, errored silently, or were no-ops. Verify stop placement logic includes holiday guards consistent with the entry/monitor workflows.

- **WARNING | weekly_pipeline | universe size not reported**: Stage 01 completed but no universe size was logged in the output metadata. Cannot verify whether ticker count is within the 4,800–5,500 normal range this week. Add or check universe size logging for Stage 01.

- **INFO | premarket_monitor | week of 2026-05-26**: No Monday morning premarket checks ran (holiday week). Premarket monitor was triggered multiple times on Sunday 2026-05-25 and Monday 2026-05-26 but all skipped as "not a normal trading week." Confirm the Tuesday open (2026-05-26) was treated as the effective entry day — entry did run Tuesday, so this appears handled correctly.

- **INFO | execution_tracker | 2026-05-23 00:12:16**: `basket_avg_return=None` and `top_contributor=None` for the week of 2026-05-22. Return data may not have been available at tracking time. Verify these fields populated in a subsequent run or are available for performance attribution.

ISSUES FOUND:

- **CRITICAL | retrain | 2026-05-23 00:13:08 & 03:28:14**: In-sample IC of **0.2831** is severely below the acceptable floor of 0.40. This model is deployed for live trading but is performing well outside normal range. The self_refine weight rejection (sentiment weight 0.03 below minimum 0.05) triggered a retry, but the retrained model still produced the same IC score. Verify whether this week's entries (AXTI et al.) were scored with a degraded model. Immediate review of model inputs and feature quality recommended.

- **CRITICAL | alpaca_trader | 2026-05-26 22:11:57**: Second entry attempt filed **0 filled, 20 FAILED** across all 10 symbols. This fired ~52 minutes after a successful first entry (10/10 filled at 21:19:48). Root cause unknown — possible duplicate order rejection, account state issue, or API fault. Confirm no unintended duplicate positions were opened or that the broker correctly rejected duplicates rather than erroneously canceling live positions.

- **WARNING | alpaca_trader | 2026-05-25 21:19:54 & 22:15:23**: `place_stops` mode invoked on a **market holiday** (Memorial Day). No fills or positions existed at that point (entries hadn't run yet), but stop placement logic was executing against a holiday session. Confirm stop orders were not submitted to the broker and that no orphaned stop orders exist in the account.

- **WARNING | weekly_pipeline | Universe size not reported**: Stage 01 completed successfully but no universe size (ticker count) was logged. Cannot confirm whether the 4,800–5,500 ticker normal range was met this week. Add universe size to Stage 01 success log output.

- **INFO | alpaca_trader | week return -3.07%**: Portfolio closed the week down 3.07% ($111,589 → $108,162). Not a system failure, but combined with the degraded IC score (0.2831), this warrants monitoring to determine if model quality is contributing to underperformance.

- **INFO | execution_tracker | 2026-05-23 00:12:16**: `basket_avg_return=None` and `top_contributor=None` for week 2026-05-22. Return attribution data missing from execution log. Investigate whether this is a timing issue (positions not yet closed when tracker ran) or a data pipeline gap.
